metadata.description: Claude Code skills for AI-driven solo developers shipping npm packages.

plugins.name: solo-npm
plugins.description: Twelve AI skills wrapping every npm operator capability solo devs use — publish, version, dist-tag, deprecate, audit, outdated, view, owner, login + 2FA + OIDC. Bootstrap (init, trust), per-release (release, verify with manifest pkg-check), lifecycle transitions (prerelease, hotfix with cherry-pick), operate (status, audit, deps, dist-tag, deprecate, owner). OIDC + provenance; foolproof npm login handoff for registry mutations. Composes with addyosmani/agent-skills for development phases.
